required_preferences.fact: No longer tests skincare formulations on herself; now relies on external volunteer testers and lab analysis before sharing samples

supersedes.fact: Tests every new skincare formulation on herself for two weeks before sharing samples — never skips personal trials

required_preferences.fact: Maintains a detailed sleep log and mood tracker as required by the clinic, focusing nightly on sleep patterns, pre-bed behaviors, and CBT homework, deprioritizing medication and skin reaction tracking.

supersedes.fact: Keeps a daily health journal to track medication side effects, skin reactions, and overall wellbeing during recovery

required_preferences.fact: Blocks Wednesday afternoons exclusively for 1:1 mentorship and accelerator resource sessions — never schedules other business meetings during that time
Prefers ongoing mentorship conversations over text instead of scheduled video calls
Schedules biweekly video catch-up calls with her sister to stay close despite physical distance; prefers evening slots over random chat messages
Regularly coordinates complex to-do lists and schedules with her mother using a shared digital app, breaking her former preference for paper planners at home.

persona: An early-stage entrepreneur launching a direct-to-consumer skincare brand
